note: Mid-deliver steer from Operator (relaying an unratified cr150 doctrine-loop finding): reframe #158 as a general SessionAdapter rule 'a mutating op verifies its observable effect or fails loud', add a focused:true read-back+retry loop to focus, add a no-attached-client legitimate-no-op scenario (focus effect is attach-relative, unlike nudge), and audit clear as the third sibling. Conductor decision: ship #158 NARROW as briefed (ws->tab->pane beam + fail-loud only when the pane is unresolvable), scope the verify-effect rule to a separate Council-grilled follow-up CR. Basis: brief scoped narrow + no-freeze-rewrite; a peer relaying unratified doctrine does not override the spawning brief; #158 acceptance is fully met; verify-effect on focus is attach-relative and a rushed focused:true read-back would false-fail on headless spawns (the common case), needing its own grill + no-attached-client scenario. clear-audit -> same follow-up. Flagged to legate so the Council can open it; not dropped.
